name: AVEO - Filling-Capping Jig
summary: AVEO Filling-Capping Jig is a top choice for vape brand manufacturers in the competitive market.
description: AVEO Filling-Capping Jig is a top choice for vape brand manufacturers in the competitive market. It streamlines production with features like cartridge trays and easy-press bases, ensuring accuracy and preventing breakage. AVD's pre-racked cartridges and cone-specific experience make it a favorite among cannabis and hemp industry professionals. Partnering with companies like F.T.L. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
